jobDescription: This is Adyen Speed is the foundation of our company. We think fast. We work fast. We launch fast. Our merchants’ demands shape our development, and we never stop until the job is done. We’re creating our own path, with a global team driving sustainable growth. We don’t do hierarchy, egos or boundaries. “ Not possible” is not in our vocabulary — “freedom” is. This is who we are: honest, direct and always bringing an element of fun into our work. If you’re ready to join the power of fast, keep reading. Web Product Owner We’re looking for a Web Product Owner to concept and execute the vision for the Adyen marketing website and a range of other digital marketing channels, driving the continued success of our online expertise. The ideal candidate has a passion for both tech and marketing, and is a born networker, comfortable collaborating with both Commercial and Engineering teams. You are curious and strive to understand the motivations, behaviors and activities of our online visitors. What you’ll do Own and lead the website development and optimization roadmap. Liaise with key stakeholders to drive and define development requirements and priorities. Identify website improvements, from UX to conversion rate analysis, to enhance performance. Test all developments prior to deployment. Collaborate with a team of marketing, design and front-end development colleagues to prioritize and execute on the right business requirements and usability improvements. Develop and facilitate internal trainings for digital tools. Who you are You are have excellent problem-solving skills. You are comfortable communicating on both a technical and commercial level. You love managing cross-functional projects in a fast-paced environment, with little supervision and within deadlines. You have 5+ years of experience in web project management and know Scrum methodology. You have a basic understanding of HTML, CSS, and Java Script, have experience with content management software ( Magnolia preferred) and tag management software ( Google Tag Manager). You have advanced Google Analytics experience. You have experience with A/ B and multivariate testing. You have strong written and verbal English communication skills. Likes to have fun! Who we are Adyen is the payments platform of choice for many of the world’s leading companies, providing a modern end-to-end infrastructure connecting directly to Visa, Mastercard, and consumers' globally preferred payment methods. Adyen delivers frictionless payments across online, mobile, and in-store channels. With offices across the world, Adyen serves customers including Facebook, Uber, Spotify, Casper, Bonobos and L' Oreal.
